author: potuz
content: Are you guys able to request a missing parent block as well as a missing parent payload if you're missing them to import a payload/block? I believe you just added the first case right?

author: 0xunclebill
content:
we are still heavily reliant on gossip, but we'll cache the payload when we haven't seen the parent block yet. and we'll import the cached payload as soon as its parent block has been imported. 

in the other case you mention, we are not handling that at all.

I'm trying to hack together what we call lookup sync, which should handle the second case you mention and make us less reliant on gossip in general.

author: potuz
content: Yeah the second part also happens with short slots but it's less likely

author: potuz
content: Fwiw I didn't see any performance gain on Prysm with or without the corrected pending blocks queue
